The '''2008 [[Leeds Rhinos]] season''' saw the club compete in [[Super League XIII]] as well as the [[2008 Challenge Cup]] tournament.

== Events by month ==
=== February ===
* Super League 13 Started on Friday, 2 February (ko 7.30pm )with Leeds beating Hull KR 20–12 at Headingley.
* 29th, Leeds beat Australasian Grand Final winners [[Melbourne Storm]] in the [[2008 World Club Challenge]] 10–4 at Elland Road.

=== March ===
* The Rhinos lost their first game against [[Castleford Tigers]] on 7 March, (Round 5 of Super League) at The Jungle. This was also [[Castleford Tigers|Castleford's]] first win of the season.<ref>{{cite web| url=http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/7275731.stm| title=Castleford 38–20 Leeds| publisher=BBC Sport| date=7 March 2008| accessdate=7 March 2008| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20080311024035/http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/7275731.stm| archivedate= 11 March 2008 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== April ===
* Super League club played first game in the Challenge cup.

=== May ===
* [[Leeds Rhinos]] defeated [[Bradford Bulls]] 40–26 in the 2nd [[Magic Weekend|Millennium Magic]] at Cardiff's [[Millennium Stadium]]

=== June ===
* [[London Broncos#2006–2011: Harlequins Rugby League|Harlequins]] inflicted only the Rhinos 3rd defeat of the Season when they won 28–24 at the [[Twickenham Stoop]]

=== July ===
* Leeds played [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]] in the Challenge Cup Semi Final on 26 July 2008.
